positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration featuring a group of diverse, abstractly rendered animals—a fox, a deer, a flying owl, and a small rabbit—standing together in a harmonious meadow. The composition is centered, utilizing negative space effectively. Style: Line art meets geometric shapes, reminiscent of modern folk art or Nordic illustration. Strong black ink outlines against a muted background of forest greens, earthy blues, and soft yellows. The design must be highly scalable, featuring thick, confident lines and solid, flat blocks of color for clean printing on t-shirts. Clean silhouettes and symbolic representation are key. Vector quality, flat color palette, high contrast.
negative: photorealistic, complex background, noisy, low detail, blurry, text, watermark, logo, trademark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy, grunge, gradient, 3D render, signature
